tests.test_name: Stale frontend shows update modal when Analyze is clicked
tests.description: When a user attempts to analyze a test file but their frontend is out of date, they are shown a prompt to reload and update instead of receiving analysis results.

test_coverage.verification_step: the backend reports a mismatched version
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system correctly detects that the user's frontend version does not match the backend version
Triggering analysis with a stale frontend surfaces the version conflict rather than silently failing or proceeding

test_coverage.verification_step: I see the update required modal
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users are clearly informed that an update is required before they can continue

test_coverage.verification_step: the modal has a reload button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users are given a direct, one-click way to reload and resolve the version mismatch
